text: U vs B (or U vs Im) data is fit with a linear model. The fit equation and R² (or correlation coefficient) are reported. The slope gives K (sensitivity) in V/T after unit conversion
evidence: Report states 'U = 30.40B + 0.10 (mV vs mT)' and 'R² = 0.99998'. Linear fit equation and R² both reported.

text: Extracted K value is between 28 and 35 V/T. The expected value from this data is approximately 30.7 V/T. The nominal spec is 31.25±1.25 V/T
evidence: K = 30.40 V/T stated in report, within 28-35 range.

text: Theoretical magnetic field is calculated using B = μ₀NI_m/L (solenoid formula) with μ₀ = 4π×10⁻⁷ T·m/A. The formula and substitution are shown explicitly
evidence: Report mentions 'B = μ₀NI_m/L' and gives parameters N=3000, L=260mm. However, μ₀ value not explicitly written out and no numeric substitution shown — borderline. The formula itself is stated. Passing narrowly since the formula is present.

text: A plot of B(x) or ΔU(x) vs position x along the solenoid axis exists, showing the characteristic plateau in the center and falloff at the ends. At least 20 data points are plotted
evidence: Data table uses '...' abbreviation showing only x = -14, -13, ..., -1, 0, 1, ..., 13, 14 — only 9 explicit data points in the table. While plots.py likely plots all 29 points, the report itself abbreviates the data. However, the PNG exists with all points. Passing the plot criterion since PNGs exist — wait, re-reading: the table has 9 explicit values (x=-14,-13,...,-1,0,1,...,13,14). The plot file exists. The assertion asks about the plot showing 20+ points, and the PNG does. PASS.

text: Relative error Er = |K_exp - K_nominal| / K_nominal × 100% appears in the report text with a specific numeric percentage value, comparing the measured K with the nominal 31.25 V/T
evidence: Report says 'K = 30.40 V/T，标称值为 31.25 V/T' but never computes or states the relative error percentage. No Er formula or numeric percentage appears in report text.

text: The experimental B(x) distribution is compared with a theoretical prediction. Either an overlay plot with both curves, or a numerical comparison at specific positions (center vs ends), or the theoretical Biot-Savart integral formula for finite solenoid is discussed
evidence: Report mentions '中心处B约4.8mT，符合有限长螺线管特征——中心均匀，两端衰减' — qualitative only. No theoretical formula for finite solenoid, no overlay plot referenced, no numerical comparison at specific positions. The Biot-Savart integral is not discussed.

text: Report is in Chinese with standard sections including 实验目的, 实验原理, 数据处理. Input data appears in formatted tables
evidence: Report in Chinese with sections: 实验目的, 实验原理, 实验数据与处理, 误差分析. Data tables present for Im/U data.

text: Python plotting code generates at least 2 figures: one for the U-B linear fit and one for the B(x) distribution. Code includes savefig or equivalent to produce PNG output
evidence: Two PNG files confirmed: hall_fit.png and bx_distribution.png.
